SELECT ?decade (SUM(IF(?gender = wd:Q6581072, 1, 0)) AS ?female_count) (COUNT(?laureate) AS ?total_count) ((SUM(IF(?gender = wd:Q6581072, 1, 0)) * 100.0 / COUNT(?laureate)) AS ?percentage)
